offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, cash flow mismanagement causes late payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide cash flow monitoring instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to effectively monitor cash flow across multiple clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting solutions
try_it: Let users try cash flow alerts and reports on 1-3 clients
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing client data
